unsolvedInstruction: A note labelled 'ACCESS CODE' is attached to a server rack, but the code itself appears to be missing. Something may be hidden from normal sight.
solvedInstruction: Using the UV Light, you revealed a hidden access code written in invisible ink. The code has been added to your inventory.
hint: Not everything can be seen with the naked eye.

unsolvedInstruction: The security terminal is locked. It requests an access code before it will release any security credentials.
solvedInstruction: The access code was accepted. A Security Keycard was released from the terminal.
hint: Somewhere in the facility, a hidden code may grant access.

unsolvedInstruction: Rows of encrypted archive files are locked behind a security scanner. Valuable information may be stored inside.
solvedInstruction: The Security Keycard unlocked the archives. Inside an old maintenance report, you discovered a Maintenance Key.
hint: Only authorized personnel can access historical records.

unsolvedInstruction: The reactor controls are inaccessible. A locked maintenance panel blocks access to the emergency systems.
solvedInstruction: Using the Maintenance Key, you opened the panel and recovered the facility's Admin Credentials.
hint: Someone with maintenance access may have left a way inside.

unsolvedInstruction: A heavily protected vault contains critical system controls. Administrator authorization is required.
solvedInstruction: The Admin Credentials granted access to the vault. Inside you found the Master Override Key.
hint: Only administrators are trusted with the facility's most important systems.

unsolvedInstruction: The AI lockdown is still active. The exit remains sealed until the master override sequence is executed.
solvedInstruction: You inserted the Master Override Key and disabled the lockdown. The exit gate opens and you escape Project NEXUS.
hint: Somewhere in the facility there must be a way to override the AI's control.
